title: ormocarpum sennoides
intro: Ormocarpum sennoides, also known as the tree senna, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, typically found in tropical Africa and Asia. The tree senna has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ormocarpum sennoides include treating diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and fever. In herbal preparations, the tree senna is often used as a powder or extract, and can be consumed as a tea or capsule to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
